bridge_equation_v35.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v35 = mix(B_plastic_v34, L_sys_enlarge, 1 - P_sys_enlarge, D_feature_v29, 1 - G_brain_v29)
bridge_equation_v35.structure_term: B_struct_v35 = mix(B_struct_v34, S_sys_enlarge, R_sys_enlarge, 1 - P_sys_enlarge, D_structure_v29)
bridge_equation_v35.readiness_term: R_train_v35 = mix(R_train_v34, B_plastic_v35, B_struct_v35, R_sys_enlarge, D_align_v29, 1 - P_sys_enlarge)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v35 checks whether systemic low-risk enlargement begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more consolidated way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this systemic enlargement still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
